'''lawuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyanol|kyanol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-w-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyanol|kyanol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| lawuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:læwizhith|læwizhith]] || [[word:læwizhij|læwizhij]] || [[word:læwizhish|læwizhish]] || [[word:læwizhi|læwizhi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lawuwuzhuth|lawuwuzhuth]] || [[word:lawuwuzhuj|lawuwuzhuj]] || [[word:lawuwuzhush|lawuwuzhush]] || [[word:lawuwuzhu|lawuwuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lawuzhuth|lawuzhuth]] || [[word:lawuzhuj|lawuzhuj]] || [[word:lawuzhush|lawuzhush]] || [[word:lawuzhu|lawuzhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lawufzhuth|lawufzhuth]] || [[word:lawufzhuj|lawufzhuj]] || [[word:lawufzhush|lawufzhush]] || [[word:lawufzhuf|lawufzhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lawuzhuthu|lawuzhuthu]] || [[word:lawuzhuju|lawuzhuju]] || [[word:lawuzhushu|lawuzhushu]] || [[word:lawuzhuku|lawuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lawuzhuth|lawuzhuth]] || [[word:lawuzhuj|lawuzhuj]] || [[word:lawuzhush|lawuzhush]] || [[word:lawuzhu|lawuzhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lawuzhuthul|lawuzhuthul]] || [[word:lawuzhujul|lawuzhujul]] || [[word:lawuzhushul|lawuzhushul]] || [[word:lawuzhukul|lawuzhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lawuzhuthuthu|lawuzhuthuthu]] || [[word:lawuzhujuju|lawuzhujuju]] || [[word:lawuzhushushu|lawuzhushushu]] || [[word:lawuzhuku|lawuzhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lawuzhuthun|lawuzhuthun]] || [[word:lawuzhujun|lawuzhujun]] || [[word:lawuzhushun|lawuzhushun]] || [[word:lawuzhukun|lawuzhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lawuzhuthuoro|lawuzhuthuoro]] || [[word:lawuzhujuoro|lawuzhujuoro]] || [[word:lawuzhushuoro|lawuzhushuoro]] || [[word:lawuzhukuoro|lawuzhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
